input.prompt:
I'm adding dark mode to my .NET MAUI Android app. I created ResourceDictionary
themes and used StaticResource to bind colors in my XAML pages. When I
switch themes at runtime nothing changes — the colors stay the same. Also,
when the user toggles dark mode in Android settings my app seems to restart
completely. What am I doing wrong?

input.initialPrompt:
I'm adding dark mode to my .NET MAUI Android app. I created ResourceDictionary
themes and used StaticResource to bind colors in my XAML pages. When I
switch themes at runtime nothing changes — the colors stay the same. Also,
when the user toggles dark mode in Android settings my app seems to restart
completely. What am I doing wrong?

data.content:
Two separate issues here:

**1. `StaticResource` doesn't update at runtime.**
`StaticResource` resolves once at XAML load time. Switch to `DynamicResource` so bindings re-evaluate when the dictionary changes:

```xml
<!-- ✗ won't update -->
<Label TextColor="{StaticResource PrimaryTextColor}" />

<!-- ✓ updates when you swap the dictionary -->
<Label TextColor="{DynamicResource PrimaryTextColor}" />
```

Then swap themes in code by replacing the merged dictionary:

```csharp
var mergedDicts = Application.Current.Resources.MergedDictionaries;
mergedDicts.Clear();
mergedDicts.Add(useDark ? new DarkTheme() : new LightTheme());
```

**2. Android restarts the Activity on `uiMode` config changes.**
By default, Android destroys and recreates the Activity when dark mode toggles. Tell it to handle the change itself in your `MainActivity.cs`:

```csharp
[Activity(
    Theme = "@style/Maui.SplashTheme",
    ConfigurationChanges = ConfigChanges.UiMode
        | ConfigChanges.ScreenSize
        | ConfigChanges.Orientation
        | ConfigChanges.SmallestScreenSize
        | ConfigChanges.Density)]
public class MainActivity : MauiAppCompatActivity { }
```

Adding `ConfigChanges.UiMode` prevents the restart. You can then detect the change and apply your theme:

```csharp
public override void OnConfigurationChanged(Configuration newConfig)
{
    base.OnConfigurationChanged(newConfig);
    bool isDark = (newConfig.UiMode & UiMode.NightMask) == UiMode.NightYes;
    // swap your ResourceDictionary here
}
```

**TL;DR:** `StaticResource` → `DynamicResource` for runtime updates; add `ConfigChanges.UiMode` to your `Activity` attribute to prevent the restart.
data.reasoningText:
The user is asking about two specific .NET MAUI issues related to theming/dark mode on Android:

1. **StaticResource vs DynamicResource**: They're using `StaticResource` to bind colors, but colors don't update at runtime when switching themes. This is because `StaticResource` is resolved once at load time and never updates. They need to use `DynamicResource` instead.

2. **App restarting on Android dark mode toggle**: When the user toggles dark mode in Android system settings, the app restarts completely. This is because Android destroys and recreates the Activity on configuration changes (like `uiMode` changes). They need to handle this in their Android configuration.


Now I'm formulating the solution approach for both issues.
